atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports intermittent left knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain occurs less than once a day when walking

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is accompanied by a feeling of giving out

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes holding grocery carts to provide support

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports holding grocery carts to provide stability

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain helps alleviate the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any history of trauma or injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any history of medication for the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is planning a trip to Georgia in the next month

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is hesitant to participate in line dances

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals no visible edema or erythema.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is reduced, with a slight apprehension in the left knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation elicits tenderness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Neurological exam is intact.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are stable: temperature 98.2°F, pulse 72, respirations 16, blood pressure 120/78.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressures have been running around that range for several days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking farxiga.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking amlodipine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking lisinopril.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking hydrochlorothiazide.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: His blood sugars have been running a little higher at about 130 in the morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He has been told that the morning blood sugars are higher for some people.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A slight systolic ejection murmur is heard at the left base.
